white"></i></div> <!----> <!----></div></div> <!----></div></div></div> <h3 class="comment-nickname__wrp"><div class="weui-desktop-popover__wrp comment-list-rich-buddy"><span class="weui-desktop-popover__target"><span class="comment-nickname"><span>无风之城的温暖角落</span> <!----> <!----> <i class="icon icon-sticker"></i> <!----> <!----></span></span> <div class="weui-desktop-popper rich_buddy" style="display: none;"><!----> <div class="weui-desktop-popover__desc"><div class="buddy-card_area"><div class="buddy-card_box loading"><span class="vm_box"></span> <i class="icon_loading_small white"></i></div> <!----> <!----></div></div> <!----></div></div> <span class="comment-nickname__ext">留言1次</span> <span class="comment-nickname__ext"></span> <!----> <span class="weui-desktop-status-tag-wrap"><!----></span></h3></div> <div class="comment-list__item-opr"><a href="javascript:void(0);" title="新留言" class="opr_icon icon-new comment_opr_meta"></a> <div class="comment-list__opr-actions"><div class="weui-desktop-popover__wrp comment_opr_meta"><a href="javascript:void(0);" title="取消精选" class="opr_icon icon-starred"></a> <!----></div> <div class="comment_opr_meta comment_opr_meta__like"><a href="javascript:void(0);" title="取消点赞" class="opr_icon like_icon" style="display: none;"></a> <a href="javascript:void(0);" title="点赞" class="opr_icon unlike_icon"></a> <span class="">1</span></div> <a href="javascript:void(0);" title="回复" class="opr_icon icon-reply comment_opr_meta"></a> <!----></div> <div class="comment_opr_meta comment-list__opr-list" style=""><a slot="target" href="javascript:void(0);" title="更多操作" class="opr_icon icon-more"></a></div> <div class="weui-desktop-popover__wrp comment_opr_meta comment-list__opr-list" style="display: none;"><span class="weui-desktop-popover__target"><a href="javascript:void(0);" title="更多操作" class="opr_icon icon-more"></a></span> <div class="weui-desktop-popover weui-desktop-popover_pos-up-right" style="display: none;"><div class="weui-desktop-popover__inner"><!----> <div class="weui-desktop-popover__desc"><div><ul><li>屏蔽此留言</li> <li>删除留言</li> <li>加入黑名单</li> <li><div><div>置顶</div></div></li></ul></div></div> <!----></div></div></div></div> <div class="comment-text">边境防渗透，大范围武装反暴恐份子渗透巡逻，低成本低烈度战场监控与通信中续，对巡逻/反恐部队快速火力支援及小重量空投，在新疆/西藏/青海有很大的应用空间。也不用说搞成一模一样，国产蜗浆搞个现代化改进，大比例用已有零部件和设备/加工工艺，搞一个功能类似的型号，并不是昂贵或者浪费，而且，对应的零部件及工艺，也是大型无人机所需要的。先搞一个有人版，再搞一个深度改进无人版，或者反过来先搞无人版，再搞航程减半有人版，做成一系列，也不是不可以。喷气式和直升机，也是有很多局限性的。</div> <!----> <i class="icon icon-sticker"></i> <!----> <!----></span></span> <div class="weui-desktop-popover weui-desktop-popover_pos-up-left rich_buddy" style="display: none;"><div class="weui-desktop-popover__inner"><!----> <div class="weui-desktop-popover__desc"><div class="buddy-card_area"><div class="buddy-card_box loading"><span class="vm_box"></span> <i class="icon_loading_small white"></i></div> <!----> <!----></div></div> <!----></div></div></div> <span class="comment-nickname__ext">留言1次</span> <span class="comment-nickname__ext"></span> <!----> <span class="weui-desktop-status-tag-wrap"><!----></span></h3></div> <div class="comment-list__item-opr"><a href="javascript:void(0);" title="新留言" class="opr_icon icon-new comment_opr_meta"></a> <div class="comment-list__opr-actions"><div class="weui-desktop-popover__wrp comment_opr_meta"><a href="javascript:void(0);" title="取消精选" class="opr_icon icon-starred"></a> <!----></div> <div class="comment_opr_meta comment_opr_meta__like"><a href="javascript:void(0);" title="取消点赞" class="opr_icon like_icon" style="display: none;"></a> <a href="javascript:void(0);" title="点赞" class="opr_icon unlike_icon"></a> <span class="">1</span></div> <a href="javascript:void(0);" title="回复" class="opr_icon icon-reply comment_opr_meta"></a> <!----></div> <div class="comment_opr_meta comment-list__opr-list"><a slot="target" href="javascript:void(0);" title="更多操作" class="opr_icon icon-more"></a></div> <div class="weui-desktop-popover__wrp comment_opr_meta comment-list__opr-list" style="display: none;"><span class="weui-desktop-popover__target"><a href="javascript:void(0);" title="更多操作" class="opr_icon icon-more"></a></span> <div class="weui-desktop-popover weui-desktop-popover_pos-up-right" style="display: none;"><div class="weui-desktop-popover__inner"><!----> <div class="weui-desktop-popover__desc"><div><ul><li>屏蔽此留言</li> <li>删除留言</li> <li>加入黑名单</li> <li><div><div>置顶</div></div></li></ul></div></div> <!----></div></div></div></div> <div class="comment-text">边境防渗透，大范围武装反暴恐份子渗透巡逻，低成本低烈度战场监控与通信中续，对巡逻/反恐部队快速火力支援及小重量空投，在新疆/西藏/青海有很大的应用空间。也不用说搞成一模一样，国产蜗浆搞个现代化改进，大比例用已有零部件和设备/加工工艺，搞一个功能类似的型号，并不是昂贵或者浪费，而且，对应的零部件及工艺，也是大型无人机所需要的。先搞一个有人版，再搞一个深度改进无人版，或者反过来先搞无人版，再搞航程减半有人版，做成一系列，也不是不可以。喷气式和直升机，也是有很多局限性的。</div>
